name_en: !!️【Complete Original Packaging】!!️MiuMiu New Mini Bowling Bag, this Arcadie leather mini handbag conveys a fashion philosophy of transforming reflections on current reality into a unique silhouette. The soft design makes the bag look fuller, showcasing a metropolitan style. The tonal letter logo adds a unique beauty and classic touch. Detachable and adjustable leather shoulder strap, cotton satin lining with card slot.
name_cn:
!!️【Complete Original Packaging】!!️MiuMiu New Mini Bowling Bag, this Arcadie leather mini handbag conveys a fashion philosophy of transforming reflections on current reality into a unique silhouette. The soft design makes the bag look fuller, showcasing a metropolitan style. The tonal letter logo adds a unique beauty and classic touch. Detachable and adjustable leather shoulder strap, cotton satin lining with card slot.
Model: 5B.
Size: 19X10X5cm
Color: Burgundy Embroidery/Original Leather.
Italian Creation
